title: Xbox confirms massive restructuring with layoffs across multiple studios to focus on its strongest franchises
summary: The company admits to overextending itself and changes its strategy, generating reactions in the industry and among politicians.

title: IO Interactive regains rights to Project Fantasy and closes its Istanbul studio after dissolving agreement with Xbox
summary: The Hitman developer splits from Microsoft, confirms the project continues, and announces layoffs as part of the restructuring.

title: Obsidian Entertainment loses a quarter of its staff in Xbox's wave of mass layoffs
summary: The studio responsible for The Outer Worlds and Fallout: New Vegas is one of the most affected, confirming the drastic reduction of its workforce.

title: Half of id Software's team may have been laid off, and John Romero reacts with regret and asks to preserve the legacy
summary: The co-creator of Doom shows solidarity with those affected and recalls the importance of preserving the history of the legendary shooter studio.

title: Campaign against Sony for eliminating physical discs surpasses 170,000 signatures and the company receives a wave of criticism
summary: Players threaten to cancel PS Plus and the company breaks its silence only to be harshly condemned on social media and in the media.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker emerges as the great RPG contender of 2026 after four hours of hands-on time by the specialized press
summary: First impressions highlight its combat, romance, and plot twists, favorably comparing it to The Witcher 3 saga.

title: Xbox layoffs force delay and changes to The Elder Scrolls Online roadmap
summary: The studio behind the popular MMO suffers a new wave of cuts that directly affect the planned content release for the game.

title: Xbox Game Pass fails to reach even half of its subscriber targets despite $80 billion investment
summary: Microsoft's subscription service is far below its projected goals, according to multiple industry reports.

title: Xbox announces Game Pass games for July 2026 with Tony Hawk, Palworld 1.0, and The Planet Crafter
summary: The mid-month wave includes major titles and the full version of Palworld for subscribers of the service.

title: Pokémon captures attention with rumors of 300 new creatures, leaks of LEGO sets, and a football collaboration in Japan
summary: The franchise mixes speculation about the next generation with official toy announcements and a partnership with 60 Japanese teams.

title: Two new collections of classic Jaleco arcade games will come to Nintendo Switch, PS5, and PC this winter
summary: Gravity Game Arise launches compilations Volume 1 and 2 that rescue the mythical titles from the Japanese company.

title: The debate on artificial intelligence in video games intensifies with opposing stances from Sony, Amano, and developers
summary: While Sony defends it as a key technology, the Final Fantasy artist and studio directors express skepticism and fear for the future.

title: Subnautica 2 receives its first major update with important changes to marine creature behavior
summary: The long-awaited update allows stunning fish and introduces highly requested improvements to the fauna of the ocean survival game.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader releases a massive patch on Switch 2 with all its downloadable content for free
summary: The tactical RPG seeks to redeem itself after a disappointing launch by offering all its expansions and DLC at no additional cost to players.

title: State of Decay 3 may not ultimately come to Xbox Game Pass after Undead Labs layoffs
summary: The future of the zombie game as a subscription service release is uncertain after the restructuring of the developer studio.

title: Arc Raiders implements one of the most requested matchmaking features and actively combats cheating
summary: The update allows switching between game modes and drastically reduces the percentage of players with anomalous benefits and item duplication.

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance's lead actor criticizes the industry for not giving him more job opportunities
summary: Tom McKay states that the success of the acclaimed open-world RPG did not translate into new roles in other commercial video games.

title: GOG gives away a classic Daedalic adventure game for a limited time
summary: The digital distribution platform offers for free one of the most remembered graphic adventures from the German studio for only a few days.

title: Veteran engineer with 37 years at Microsoft, key to Xbox backward compatibility, laid off in restructuring
summary: The wave of cuts does not spare one of the company's longest-serving and beloved employees, who designed one of its most iconic features.

title: Captain Tsubasa II: World Fighters showcases its game modes and triggers nostalgia among fans of the 80s anime
summary: The new arcade soccer title seeks to capture the essence and spectacularity of the original series of Oliver and Benji.
